description_long: This is a small, enclosed farmstead featuring two distinct buildings: a green farmhouse with a red gabled roof and a red barn with a tan roof. The property is divided into two main sections, one with green grass and the other with brown, tilled soil, separated by wooden and white fences. The grassy area contains stacked logs and is bordered by several stylized red pine trees, while the barnyard area includes a fenced pen and scattered wooden planks. The farmhouse has a front door and windows, and the barn appears to have a large entry suitable for livestock or equipment. The entire scene is surrounded by a perimeter fence, creating a clear boundary for the farm. The layout and details evoke a traditional rural setting, with visible pathways and open spaces for movement and storage.
description: A compact farmstead with a green farmhouse, red barn, fenced grassy and tilled areas, stacked logs, and stylized red pine trees, all enclosed by wooden and white fences.
description_view_0: Front view showing the green farmhouse with a red roof, the red barn with a tan roof, and the fenced grassy and tilled areas with logs and red pine trees in the background.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the separation between the grassy log-stacked area and the brown barnyard, with the barn and farmhouse visible from the side.
description_view_2: Rear view focusing on the back of the barn and farmhouse, with the white fence and log piles more prominent, and the red pine trees to the right.
description_view_3: Angled view showing both buildings from the back, the full extent of the fenced grassy and tilled areas, and the red pine trees along the edge.
